channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: The strange, multicultural slang of Toronto’s teenagers
item.description: "Explore the unique lingo of Toronto's teens, where cultures blend and slang gets redefined. From diverse neighborhoods to social media, discover the fascinating world of multicultural slang in the 6ix. Read more about this phenomenon here: https://www.economist.com/the-americas/2026/04/06/the-strange-multicultural-slang-of-torontos-teenagers"
